author: bharath.vedartham
content:
I have a question w.r.t proposer preferences. How would a validator client like vouch communicate the proposer preferences to the beacon node?
I think beacon nodes would implement the `/eth/v1/validator/proposer_preferences` defined at: https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/pull/608/changes#diff-faf0bd13f84da9cddead43dc8482896e52d1d19db09a2d688b6fa18f977ec003R1 and vouch would have to call this API to the beacon node with the proposer preferences they create right?
